title.en: Zebrafish Stripes — Turing Pattern in Vivo
title.ko: 얼룩말물고기 줄무늬 — in vivo 튜링 패턴

subtitle.en: zebrafish stripes emerge from local interactions between two pigment cell types — a real-world Turing reaction-diffusion system
subtitle.ko: 얼룩말물고기 줄무늬는 두 색소세포의 국소 상호작용 — 실세계 Turing 반응-확산

description.en: Zebrafish body with adjustable stripe wavelength. Turing reaction-diffusion regenerates pattern after disruption (Kondo 2010).
description.ko: 조정 가능 줄무늬 파장의 얼룩말물고기. Turing 반응-확산이 disruption 후 패턴 재생.
